capabilities.name: Carrier rate shopping
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: list_shipping_options(800g,SEK) live via MCP gateway → 2 carriers compared, sorted by price (PostNord 4900 / DHL 5900); place_order auto-selects cheapest matching carrier (verified order 3ccaa76e: 3000g → DHL Paket 1-5kg 8900, total 44900 = items+shipping). UI: CheckoutPage delivery selector lists all carrier options via the same RPC, cheapest pre-selected.
capabilities.notes: list_shipping_options RPC (destination-aware since 2026-07-07 migration) + list_shipping_options skill + place_order shipping wiring (Lovable commit c6089265). Closes OpenClaw finding e50f0784.

capabilities.name: Weight-based rate calc
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: manage_shipping_rate create live (Standard 0-1kg → rate_id) + calc_shipping_rate(PostNord,800g)→4900. UI: Shipping Rates section + rate calculator in ShippingPage (commit 66d1b018).
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-13; admin UI built + Stage-3 live 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: Dimensional weight
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: calc_shipping_rate with dims live (2000g @40x30x20 → dimensional_grams 4800, billed_on dimensional). UI: rate calculator shows billed_on actual|dimensional in ShippingPage.
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-13; surfaced in the Shipping Rates calculator 2026-07-06.
